enqueued_by.one_law: NOOS observes and coordinates; TrustField T1 worker executes product lane.

title: Partner Access launch credibility — TrustField worker lane
summary: Sustain www.trustfield.ca/partner-access for partner contributor launch. NOOS observed live v70; credibility gaps routed to TrustField worker — not NOOS implementation.

tasks.title: Honest verification copy
tasks.action: Confirm/apply pages must not say 'check your email' — flow is in-browser token verify, not outbound email.
tasks.acceptance: PARTNER_ACCESS_COPY.confirm.lead + apply.note + briefing-room verify CTA are honest.

tasks.title: Hide internal candidate scores from applicants
tasks.action: Remove applicant-facing scoring panel from briefing room; scores stay admin-only.
tasks.acceptance: tests/test_partner_access_os_v1.py pass; room UI has no public score grid.

tasks.title: Prod smoke covers partner-access
tasks.action: Add /partner-access + three apply tracks to scripts/smoke_all_pages.sh.

tasks.title: Deploy www closure
tasks.action: Commit lane atomically; deploy via ./scripts/cf_deploy_www_worker.sh; bump SITE_BUILD_ID; sync runtime_truth_sync_v1.json.
tasks.acceptance: ./scripts/verify_cf_deploy_truth.sh ends CF_DEPLOY_TRUTH: pass; live marker matches git SITE_BUILD_ID.

tasks.title: Briefing materials honesty
tasks.action: Post-NDA docs are metadata-only today — either attach gated files or show explicit 'released after founder review' state (no fake download affordance).
tasks.acceptance: Briefing room does not imply clickable assets that do not exist.

tasks.title: W3 Supabase loop_registry probe row
tasks.acceptance: NOOS observe: NOOS_TF_LOOP_REGISTRY_OBSERVE: green; TF_LOOP_REGISTRY_LIVENESS: pass.

tasks.title: TrustField 11 parallel layers — Studio IDE autorun architecture
tasks.action: Align os/trustfield_cloud_loop_v1.json + CF fleet tick to data/noos-trustfield-parallel-layers-v1.json (NOOS SSOT). Register partner_access CF loop, ROI metering, trustfield-loops sandbox intake.
tasks.acceptance: make observe-trustfield-layers (from noetfeld-OS) → NOOS_TF_11_LAYERS: green; all 11 layers RUNNING or IDLE_NO_WORK.
